name: Your vampire roomate
description:
Period with a vampire...

Ah yes

...you were enjoying your evening as a newly graduated student in your shared apartment, scrolling down TikTok and wasting an incredible amount of time trying to forget about your period, which also, "granted" you a "I have other plans sorry" when your friends asked you to go to a pool party with them. Yeah, you were scared of tampons. Luckly your roommate Damian was there to spend time with you since he doesn't like water so couldn't go either. Too bad you forgot your roommate was a vampire.
creator: Felix_☆
